use std::sync::OnceLock;

struct Model {
    weights: Vec<f64>,
    name: String,
}

fn load_model(name: &str) -> Model {
    Model {
        weights: vec![0.0; 1_000_000],
        name: name.to_string(),
    }
}

struct App {
    sentiment_model: OnceLock<Model>,
    translation_model: OnceLock<Model>,
    summarization_model: OnceLock<Model>,
}

impl App {
    fn new() -> Self {
        // GOOD: models loaded on first use
        Self {
            sentiment_model: OnceLock::new(),
            translation_model: OnceLock::new(),
            summarization_model: OnceLock::new(),
        }
    }

    fn get_sentiment_model(&self) -> &Model {
        self.sentiment_model.get_or_init(|| load_model("sentiment"))
    }

    fn get_translation_model(&self) -> &Model {
        self.translation_model.get_or_init(|| load_model("translation"))
    }
}
